items.title: Nationalism Can Curb Doctor Brain Drain, Says KPPA
items.summary: Public Service DG Wan Ahmad Dahlan says doctor brain drain can be curbed if doctors have a "sense of nationalism to help the country", amid very low housemen intake. MMA says doctors leave because "the system and policy don't reciprocate their love." The post Nationalism Can Curb Doctor Brain Drain, Says KPPA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dzulkefly: MOH Shifting To ‘Targeted’ Drug Stockpiling After Previous Covid Vaccine Wastage
items.summary: MOH is shifting to targeted, data-driven stockpiling after Covid-19 vaccine wastage, focusing on critical, fast-moving and single-source medicines, says Dr Dzul. MOH has set an April 15 deadline for pharma companies to report product availability levels. The post Dzulkefly: MOH Shifting To ‘Targeted’ Drug Stockpiling After Previous Covid Vaccine Wastage appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why The Hormuz Crisis Could Become A Dialysis Crisis For Malaysia — Azrul Mohd Khalib
items.summary: Malaysia’s health care system is deeply dependent on plastic-based medical devices, consumables, and disposables. Naphtha, a vital petroleum derivative used in plastic manufacturing and petrochemicals, is essential for the production of these items. The post Why The Hormuz Crisis Could Become A Dialysis Crisis For Malaysia — Azrul Mohd Khalib appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia’s Frontliners At Breaking Point Amid Energy Crisis — Asrie Muda
items.summary: Malaysian health care workers are at a breaking point due to fuel subsidy rationalisations during an energy crisis and mandatory job rotation policies in the service. MOH staff exempted from WFH are the most exposed to rising costs of physical mobility. The post Malaysia’s Frontliners At Breaking Point Amid Energy Crisis — Asrie Muda appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: ‘I Would Have Fallen For That’: Senior Doctors Defend Scammed HTA Housemen
items.summary: Medical officers and specialists say the housemen in the HTA scam weren't naive, but caught in systemic gaps. Inexperience, admin authority, and a culture of blind obedience made the scheme believable. Similar risks may exist across other public hospitals. The post ‘I Would Have Fallen For That’: Senior Doctors Defend Scammed HTA Housemen appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MOH Admits Energy Crisis Impact On Medicines, Medical Devices Supply
items.summary: MOH says the global energy crisis is affecting supply of medicines and medical devices in Malaysia, especially critical imported medical devices in high-risk categories, forcing "prudent" distribution. MOH is devising alternative clinical treatment plans. The post MOH Admits Energy Crisis Impact On Medicines, Medical Devices Supply appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Strategic Buffer Stocks Should Prioritise Essential Medicines — MMA
items.summary: The MMA wishes to emphasise that the global situation remains uncertain, and we cannot rely solely on the current stability. The post Strategic Buffer Stocks Should Prioritise Essential Medicines — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Expand Public Dental Capacity To Manage System Strain — MDA
items.summary: MDA reiterates that expanding facilities and strengthening service delivery capacity should be prioritised, rather than focusing solely on increasing or restricting the number of dental practitioners. The post Expand Public Dental Capacity To Manage System Strain — MDA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: BIW Allowance Cut, Expensive Flight Tickets Complicating Travel To Peninsula — Medical Officer
items.summary: The BIW allowance reduction to RM360, coupled with an automatic BISH allowance cut, leaves us with just extra RM60 compared to our friends working in Semenanjung. I can't visit my baby back home because of expensive flight tickets amid the Iran war. The post BIW Allowance Cut, Expensive Flight Tickets Complicating Travel To Peninsula — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Can’t Compare Complex Health Care To Airline Pricing — Dr Poh Ban Chung
items.summary: Comparing inherently complex health care to airline pricing doesn't quite fit. The suggestion that health care costs should be as predictable as a flight ticket assumes that the journey is already defined. In reality, health care is a process of discovery. The post Can’t Compare Complex Health Care To Airline Pricing — Dr Poh Ban Chung appeared first on CodeBlue .
